nodes.name: 黑卷尾
nodes.summary: 黑卷尾（Black drongo，学名 Dicrurus macrocercus），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于印度河，常见栖息地包括稀树草原。

nodes.name: 印度河
nodes.summary: 印度河是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联4种鸟类，包括Indian courser、红领绿鹦鹉、黑卷尾等4种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 稀树草原
nodes.summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: They are found as summer visitors to northeastern Afghanistan and northern Pakistan but are residents from the Indus Valley until Bangladesh and into India and Sri Lanka. Some populations show seasonal movements that are poorly understood while populations in Korea are known to be migratory. The black drongo can be found in savanna, fields, and urban habitats

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: They are found as summer visitors to northeastern Afghanistan and northern Pakistan but are residents from the Indus Valley until Bangladesh and into India and Sri Lanka.
